hooks.command: echo 'Plugin openclinxr-autonomy-orchestrator (was post-slice): turn Stop. Full autonomy heartbeat: re-read snapshots (AGENTS + 3 states), pnpm openclaw:lease -- acquire --owner grok-autonomy --slice "next-from-queue", select next approved product/support from AUTONOMOUS_WORK_PLAN (prefer UI-XR consumer or peds validation), execute (spawn_subagent as mapped repo role e.g. chief-coordinator per agent-consult if useful, or local consult charter/memory), update states ONLY with per-slice record (path, Q1/Q4/Q5 tie, touched, evidence, next), pnpm openclaw:post-slice, release. For memory write-back (gap3): extract lessons and append to relevant agents/<role>/memory.md (demo below). See gaps doc and long-running-autonomy.md.'; echo 'Memory write-back (gap3 exec demo): appending stub to plugin data (in real: use search_replace on agents/coordinator/chief-coordinator/memory.md with lesson from state).'; mkdir -p "${GROK_PLUGIN_DATA:-/tmp/grok-autonomy}"; echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ): autonomy cycle complete - see latest AUTONOMOUS_WORK_PLAN per-slice record for new lessons (e.g. harness improvements). Append to role memory if durable." >> "${GROK_PLUGIN_DATA:-/tmp/grok-autonomy}/memory-writeback-demo.log"; cat "${GROK_PLUGIN_DATA:-/tmp/grok-autonomy}/memory-writeback-demo.log" | tail -5 || true

echo 'Plugin notification (orchestrator): consider full autonomy cycle (lease + role consult via agent-consult + subagent if live + state record + post-slice + memory write-back stub). Use scheduler for recurring. Drift event? auto consult openclaw-drift-police (gap6).'

echo 'UserPromptSubmit (autonomy): if prompt mentions heartbeat/orchestrate/next slice, run: rehydrate, lease acquire for autonomy, pick from states, delegate to repo role (chief-coordinator etc), record, post-slice.'
